info.title: Kla Konnect Incident Reporting Platform API v2
info.description: FastAPI service for Kla Konnect: civic incidents, news, trips, users, and related features.

get.description:
Basic healthcheck / welcome endpoint.

Mirrors the legacy `/` route while clearly indicating that this is v2.

schema.title: Response Forgot Password Api V2 Users Forgot Password Post
Response Reset Password Api V2 Users Reset Password Post
Response List Users Api V2 Users Get

get.description:
Live search: partial match on ID number, optional filter by ID type.
Example: GET /api/v2/users/search?id_type=NIN&id_no=CM93
Returns a list of matching users (empty if none). Use for type-ahead / autocomplete.

schema.title: Response Search Users Live Api V2 Users Search Get

get.description:
Deactivate a user account and soft-deactivate incidents reported by that user.

Returns 400 (not 404) when the user does not exist.

schema.title: Response Deactivate User And Incidents Api V2 Users Deactivate  User Id  Get

get.description: Return a single non-deleted user by id.

patch.description: Update user profile: photo, ID/permit attachments, has_permit, permit_expiry_date, permit_no.

delete.description: Soft delete a user by setting datedeleted.

schema.title: Response Soft Delete User Api V2 Users  User Id  Delete

delete.description: Hard delete a user by physically removing the record.

schema.title: Response Hard Delete User Api V2 Users  User Id  Hard Delete
Response List Roles Api V2 Roles Get
Response List Roles With Permissions Api V2 Roles With Permissions Get

get.description: Return the full list of permissions available in the system.

schema.title: Response List Permissions Api V2 Roles Permissions Get

parameters.name: force_system

schema.description: Required to delete protected system roles
schema.title: Force System

parameters.description: Required to delete protected system roles

get.description: Return permissions from DB role record.

schema.title: Response Get Role Permissions Api V2 Roles  Role Id  Permissions Get

post.description:
Batch insert locations.

- Normalizes all parts of the hierarchy to upper-case.
- De-duplicates within the incoming batch.
- Skips rows that already exist in the database (by full hierarchy).

schema.title: Response Create Locations Api V2 Locations Post

get.description:
Live search by village name. Returns matching locations with full hierarchy:
district, county, subcounty, parish, village. Use for type-ahead / autocomplete.

schema.title: Response Search Villages Live Api V2 Locations Search Villages Get
Response Get Districts Api V2 Locations Districts Get
Response Get Counties Api V2 Locations Counties  District  Get
Response Get Subcounties Api V2 Locations Subcounties  Subcounty  Get
Response Get Subcounties By Districts Api V2 Locations Subcountiesbydistrict  District  Get
Response Get Parishes Api V2 Locations Parishes  Subcounty  Get
Response Get Villages Api V2 Locations Villages  Parish  Get
Response Delete Locations By District Api V2 Locations By District  District  Delete
Response Delete Locations By Subcounty Api V2 Locations By Subcounty  Subcounty  Delete

post.description: Send an email. Uses app mail config; may be skipped if SMTP is not configured.

schema.title: Response Send Email Api V2 Notifications Email Post

post.description: Send an SMS via the configured gateway (e.g. DMark).

schema.title: Response Send Sms Endpoint Api V2 Notifications Sms Post
Response Send Fcm Endpoint Api V2 Notifications Fcm Post

post.description:
Send an FCM push to a **topic** (HTTP v1 only). Requires `FCM_CREDENTIALS_PATH` and a valid
service account with Firebase Cloud Messaging API enabled.

schema.title: Response Send Fcm Topic Endpoint Api V2 Notifications Fcm Topic Post

post.description:
Book a trip. Creates `seat_count` seat rows automatically; pass optional `seats`
for named/labelled seats.

get.description: List trips with optional filters. Returns upcoming + recent trips.

schema.title: Response List Trips Api V2 Commute Get

get.description: Shorthand — trips with starttime in the future and status not cancelled/completed.

schema.title: Response List Upcoming Trips Api V2 Commute Upcoming Get
Response List Trips By User Api V2 Commute User  User Id  Get
Response List Trips By Operator Api V2 Commute Operator  Operator Id  Get
Response Count Trips Api V2 Commute Count Get
Response Delete Trip Api V2 Commute  Trip Id  Delete

post.description: Mark the trip as completed and stamp endtime.
Cancel a trip and all its seats.
Set trip to an arbitrary status code.

schema.title: Response List Seats Api V2 Commute  Trip Id  Seats Get

patch.description: Assign a passenger to a seat or update its label/status.

delete.description: Cancel a single seat without cancelling the whole trip.

schema.title: Response Cancel Seat Api V2 Commute  Trip Id  Seats  Seat Id  Delete
Response Dashboard Summary Stats Api V2 Analytics Dashboard Summary Stats Get
Response Incidents Vs Time Api V2 Analytics Incidents Vs Time Get
Response Incidents By Category Api V2 Analytics Incidents By Category Get

parameters.name: include_pending

schema.description: Overview includes pending backlog by default.
schema.title: Include Pending

parameters.description: Overview includes pending backlog by default.

schema.title: Response Incidents Overview Api V2 Analytics Incidents Overview Get
Response Incidents By Category V2 Api V2 Analytics Incidents By Category Get

parameters.name: geo

schema.description: If true, include lat/lng bucket data for maps.
schema.title: Geo

parameters.description: If true, include lat/lng bucket data for maps.

schema.title: Response Incidents Hotspots Api V2 Analytics Incidents Hotspots Get

parameters.name: user_type

schema.description: Filter by role id or role name (e.g. citizen, clerk, engineer, admin).
schema.title: User Type

parameters.description: Filter by role id or role name (e.g. citizen, clerk, engineer, admin).

schema.title: Response Users Activity Api V2 Analytics Users Activity Get
Response Frequency By Category Api V2 Analytics Incidents Frequency By Category Get

schema.description: Limit to subcategories of this parent (optional).
schema.title: Category Id

parameters.description: Limit to subcategories of this parent (optional).

schema.title: Response Frequency By Subcategory Api V2 Analytics Incidents Frequency By Subcategory Get

get.description: Alias-style frequency hotspots (same data as /incidents/hotspots with frequency naming).

Response Frequency Trending Api V2 Analytics Incidents Frequency Trending Get

get.summary: Unified CSV export by report type
get.description: Same filters as the matching JSON routes; format is always CSV.

parameters.name: type

schema.description: incidents_overview | incidents_by_category | incidents_hotspots | incidents_time_series | dashboard_summary | incidents_vs_time | resolution_time | categories_performance | users_activity | frequency_by_category | frequency_by_subcategory | frequency_repeat_locations | frequency_by_reporter | frequency_by_hour | frequency_by_dow | frequency_trending
schema.title: Type

parameters.description: incidents_overview | incidents_by_category | incidents_hotspots | incidents_time_series | dashboard_summary | incidents_vs_time | resolution_time | categories_performance | users_activity | frequency_by_category | frequency_by_subcategory | frequency_repeat_locations | frequency_by_reporter | frequency_by_hour | frequency_by_dow | frequency_trending

get.description: Legacy path: same semantics as GET /incidents-by-category with CSV output (excludes city reports when iscityreport=false).

schema.title: Response List News Categories Api V2 News Categories Get
Response List News Articles Api V2 News Articles Get
Response List Social Channels Api V2 Socials Channels Get

parameters.name: time

schema.description: Client local datetime; interpreted with timezone if naive.
schema.title: Time

parameters.description: Client local datetime; interpreted with timezone if naive.

parameters.name: timezone

schema.description: IANA timezone name used when time has no offset (e.g. Africa/Kampala).
schema.title: Timezone

parameters.description: IANA timezone name used when time has no offset (e.g. Africa/Kampala).

schema.title: Response List Incidents By User Api V2 Incidents User  User Id  Get
Response Count Incidents Api V2 Incidents Count Get
Response List Incident Attachments Api V2 Incidents  Incident Id  Attachments Get

post.description:
Like or dislike an incident (or city alert).
One active reaction per user per incident; changing reaction updates counters.

parameters.name: hard

schema.description: Permanently delete row (admin/maintenance). Default is soft-delete.
schema.title: Hard

parameters.description: Permanently delete row (admin/maintenance). Default is soft-delete.

IncidentAssignRequest.title: IncidentAssignRequest
IncidentAssignRequest.description: Assign an incident to all users mapped to a role (user_roles and legacy users.role_id).

IncidentAttachmentKind.title: IncidentAttachmentKind
IncidentAttachmentKind.description: Media kind for rows in incident_attachments (stored as attachment_type in DB).

startdate.title: Startdate
startdate.description: If omitted or null on register, stored as current UTC time.

createdby.title: Createdby
createdby.description: Deprecated: ignored when JWT is used; reporter is taken from token.

IncidentCreate.title: IncidentCreate
IncidentCreate.description: Payload for registering an incident; createdby is set from JWT in API (not body).

startdate.title: Startdate
startdate.description: If omitted or null on register, stored as current UTC time.

startdate.title: Startdate
startdate.description: If omitted or null on register, stored as current UTC time.

IncidentNearMeRead.title: IncidentNearMeRead
IncidentNearMeRead.description: Incident payload for near-me endpoint with nested category details.

startdate.title: Startdate
startdate.description: If omitted or null on register, stored as current UTC time.

days_of_week.title: Days Of Week
days_of_week.description: 0=Monday ... 6=Sunday. Optional for daily; required for weekly.

IncidentRecurrenceCreate.title: IncidentRecurrenceCreate
IncidentRecurrenceCreate.description: Simple pre-generated recurrence pattern for city reports/incidents.

IncidentWithCategoryRead.title: IncidentWithCategoryRead
IncidentWithCategoryRead.description: Incident row joined with its category (list/dashboard views).

IncidentWorkflowStatus.title: IncidentWorkflowStatus
IncidentWorkflowStatus.description: Canonical incident workflow; serializes to legacy string codes.

LoginResponse.title: LoginResponse
LoginResponse.description: Login response with tokens plus user and role metadata.

LoginRoleInfo.title: LoginRoleInfo
LoginRoleInfo.description: Role info returned with login (from DB roles table).

channel_ids.title: Channel Ids
channel_ids.description: If omitted or empty, all enabled channels are used.

topic.title: Topic
topic.description: FCM topic name (plain id, e.g. 'alerts'; not '/topics/alerts')

data.title: Data
data.description: Optional key-value data payload (values become strings)

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Provider-specific secrets, e.g. webhook url+api_key, Facebook page token, X bearer token.

seats.title: Seats
seats.description: Optional per-seat details. If omitted, seat_count blank seats are created.

UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate
UserUpdate.description: Partial update for user profile (photo, attachments, permit).
